sections.heading: Water Potential Calculator | AP Biology & A-Level Guide
sections.content: Calculate water potential (ψ) instantly using ψ = ψs + ψp. Includes osmotic, pressure potential & examples for AP Bio & A-Level labs.

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.

faq.question: What does the Water Potential Calculator | AP Biology & A-Level Guide do?
faq.answer: Calculate water potential (ψ) instantly using ψ = ψs + ψp. Includes osmotic, pressure potential & examples for AP Bio & A-Level labs.

faq.question: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes. Smart Calculator tools are free, work in your browser, and require no signup.
